= Web4 Documentation Portal =

Welcome to the official documentation for the Web4 Ecosystem.
This wiki serves as the central knowledge base for the Web4 platform and its related projects, covering artificial intelligence, blockchain, cloud infrastructure, APIs, SDKs, developer guides, tutorials, and reference materials.

== Overview ==

The Web4 Ecosystem includes a collection of platforms and technologies designed to build intelligent, decentralized, and scalable applications.

== Projects ==

* [[Web4]]
* [[QubuHub]]
* [[Aura Ecosystem]]
* [[Fadaka Blockchain]]
* [[GPT-5 Mini]]
* [[RODAAI]]
* [[LMLM]]
* [[NeuroMindAI]]
* [[LAMIS]]

⸻

== Documentation ==

* [[Getting Started]]
* [[Installation]]
* [[Quick Start]]
* [[Architecture]]
* [[API Reference]]
* [[SDK Documentation]]
* [[Authentication]]
* [[Deployment]]
* [[Configuration]]

⸻

== Developer Resources ==

* [[Project Structure]]
* [[Coding Standards]]
* [[Contributing]]
* [[Docker]]
* [[CI/CD]]
* [[Security]]
* [[Release Process]]

⸻

== Tutorials ==

* [[Build Your First AI]]
* [[Create an API]]
* [[Deploy to Production]]
* [[Blockchain Development]]
* [[AI Agents]]
* [[Model Integration]]

⸻

== Reference ==

* [[CLI Commands]]
* [[Environment Variables]]
* [[Error Codes]]
* [[FAQ]]
* [[Changelog]]
* [[License]]

⸻

== Community ==

* [[Discussions]]
* [[Issues]]
* [[Roadmap]]
* [[Releases]]

⸻

== Quick Navigation ==

* [[Projects]]
* [[Documentation]]
* [[Developer Resources]]
* [[Tutorials]]
* [[Reference]]
* [[Community]]

Welcome to the Web4 Ecosystem documentation. Explore the guides, contribute to the projects, and help build the next generation of intelligent technologies. 

=  wikixedia Documentation Portal =

Welcome to the official Web4 wikixedia documentation.

This wiki contains documentation for the complete Web4 ecosystem, including AI, blockchain, cloud infrastructure, APIs, SDKs, and developer resources.

------------------------------------------------------------

== Projects ==

* Web4
* QubuHub
* Aura Ecosystem
* Fadaka Blockchain
* GPT-5 Mini
* RODAAI
* NeuroMindAI
* LAMIS

------------------------------------------------------------

== Documentation ==

* Getting Started
* Installation
* Quick Start
* Architecture
* API Reference
* SDK Documentation
* Authentication
* Deployment
* Configuration

------------------------------------------------------------

== Developer Resources ==

* Project Structure
* Coding Standards
* Contributing Guide
* Docker
* CI/CD
* Security

------------------------------------------------------------

== Tutorials ==

* Build Your First AI
* Create an API
* Deploy to Production
* Blockchain Development
* AI Agents
* Model Integration

------------------------------------------------------------

== Reference ==

* CLI Commands
* Environment Variables
* Error Codes
* FAQ
* Changelog

------------------------------------------------------------

== Community ==

* Discussions
* Issues
* Roadmap
* Releases

- [[Web4]]
- [[QubuHub]]
- [[Aura Ecosystem]]
- [[Fadaka Blockchain]]
- [[GPT-5 Mini]]
- [[RODAAI]]
- [[LMLM]]
- [[NeuroMindAI]]
- [[LAMIS]]

---

## 📖 Documentation

- [[Getting Started]]
- [[Installation]]
- [[Architecture]]
- [[API]]
- [[Tutorials]]
- [[Reference]]

---

## 🛠 Developers

- [[Contributing]]
- [[Coding Standards]]
- [[Docker]]
- [[CI/CD]]
- [[Release Process]]

---

## 📚 Resources

- [[Roadmap]]
- [[FAQ]]
- [[Changelog]]
- [[License]]
